name: Stable Beluga 2 (FreeWilly 2) 70B
license: Stable Beluga Non-Commercial Community License Agreement
archDisplay: Llama 2 70B dense Transformer, Orca-style supervised fine-tune
note: Briefly #1 on the HF Open LLM Leaderboard (Jul 27 2023); Llama 2 70B fine-tuned on ~600K Orca-style synthetic examples.

results.notes: article states verbatim: 'StableBeluga2 ... get 68.8 on MMLU'

HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), ARC-Challenge 25-shot: 71.1, for stabilityai/StableBeluga2. Also independently corroborated by a Japanese blog post (note.com/bakushu) quoting the same leaderboard figure.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), HellaSwag 10-shot: 86.4.
HF Open LLM Leaderboard snapshot (2023-09-04), TruthfulQA MC 0-shot: 59.4.
HF 'open-llm-leaderboard-old' details dataset for stabilityai/StableBeluga2, harness|gsm8k|5 accuracy: 0.359, from the run dated 2023-10-15.

verificationNotes: CONFIRMED real via HF model card raw README (stabilityai/StableBeluga2) and Stability AI's blog post (Jul 21 2023, updated Jul 28): Llama-2-70B base, Orca-style SFT, licensed under 'STABLE BELUGA NON-COMMERCIAL COMMUNITY LICENSE AGREEMENT' exactly as the card states (matches record). Blog confirms Stable Beluga 2 ranked #1 on HF Open LLM Leaderboard as of Jul 27 2023 — matches the note. MMLU 68.8 result CONFIRMED verbatim on patmcguinness.substack.com. DROPPED the open-llm-leaderboard-avg 71.4 result row: fetched winbuzzer.com's article twice (different objectives) and both times it discussed the ranking/GPT-3.5 comparison but contained no numeric aggregate leaderboard score anywhere on the page, so the figure could not be verified there and was removed.
